/usr/bin/cc -rdynamic CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/sc1.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/sc2.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/sc3.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/sc4.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/sc5.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/sc6.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/sc7.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/scexpand.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/sci18n.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/sclist.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/scmemfil.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/scstate.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/scvars.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/lstring.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/memfile.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/__/amx/keeloq.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/__/linux/binreloc.c.o CMakeFiles/pawncc.dir/__/linux/installpath.c.o -o ../pawncc  -lpthread -lm
